issues.description: Action type should be 'PlayFromTrash' or similar, not 'PlayFromHand'. Card text specifies playing from trash.
Action type should be 'PlayFromTrash' or similar, not 'PlayFromHand'. Card text specifies playing from trash.
Missing 'rested' property. First card should be played normally; second card should have rested:true.
Missing rested:true property. Second card must be played rested per card text.
Missing 'optional' or 'count' constraint. Text says 'up to 1' for each, indicating player choice of 0-1 cards per category.
